session.assistant: The `fc2e1d01c` commit ("Remove plan staging dirs before implementation") was the setup-impl step that already removed impl-context from git tracking. The `.erk/impl-context/` on the local filesystem is just an untracked scratch directory. The `erk pr check` is checking for it on the filesystem but it's not in the repo. Let me just remove it from the filesystem and re-push:

session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
**PR #9353: Move navigation commands (up/down) to erk_slots package**
Changes made: - **`packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py`** (new) — Core navigation logic: `execute_stack_navigation()`, `resolve_up_navigation()`, `resolve_down_navigation()`, `render_deferred_deletion_commands()`, `get_slot_name_for_worktree()`, `unallocate_worktree_and_branch()`, `find_worktree_for_branch_or_path()` - **`packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/up_cmd.py`** (new) — `erk slot up` command - **`packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/down_cmd.py`** (new) — `erk slot down` command - **`packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/group.py`** — Registered `slot_up` and `slot_down` commands - **`src/erk/cli/commands/navigation_helpers.py`** — Trimmed to shared-only functions (activation helpers, deletion helpers, validation) - **`src/erk/cli/commands/up.py`** and **`down.py`** — Deleted - **`src/erk/cli/cli.py`** — Removed `up_cmd` and `down_cmd` registrations - **Test files** — Moved `test_up.py`, `test_down.py`, `test_stack_navigation.py` to `packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/` with updated CLI invocations (`["slot", "up", ...]` / `["slot", "down", ...]`) - Updated `test_graphite_command.py` and `test_help_formatter.py` to reference new locations
All 5848 unit tests pass, lint clean, type check clean.
